title: Self-referential object whose cycle closes via an index signature
description: mion circularRefs.spec.ts 'Circular Object with index property' — cycle closed via an index-signature value type. Exercises the index-signature for-in loop calling back into the same validator.
notes: A `Date` (or any non-null object) passes the `typeof === "object"` guard, then fails because it lacks the required `index` property (`expected: "objectLiteral"` at `["index"]`).
schema:
const ci = RT.circular((self) => RT.object({index: RT.record(self)}));
return createValidate(ci);
